prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.2 kg; Height 179.6 cm; BMI 19.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 140/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 269mg/dL; 9 months ago 245mg/dL; 6 months ago 228mg/dL; 3 months ago 197mg/dL; current 122mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 62.3kg; 9 months ago 58.7kg; 6 months ago 60.7kg; 3 months ago 58.7kg; current 63.2kg), Height (12 months ago 179.6cm; 9 months ago 179.6cm; 6 months ago 179.6cm; 3 months ago 179.6cm; current 179.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 138mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 140mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 12U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 10U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 259mg/g; 9 months ago 337mg/g; 6 months ago 306mg/g; 3 months ago 302mg/g; current 277mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 112mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.3g/dL; 9 months ago 12.3g/dL; 6 months ago 11.8g/dL; 3 months ago 12.4g/dL; current 11.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.15 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
